name: meow
subtitle: mihomo-based VPN client for iOS
description: A lightweight iOS VPN client powered by mihomo (Clash.Meta). Distributed as an AltStore source for sideloading.

apps.name: meow
apps.subtitle: mihomo-based VPN client
apps.localizedDescription:
meow is a lightweight iOS VPN client built on top of mihomo (Clash.Meta). It supports modern proxy protocols and runs as a Network Extension.

Note: installation requires a paid Apple Developer account because the bundled PacketTunnel extension uses the Network Extension entitlement, which free Apple IDs cannot sign.
apps.versionDescription:
- Fix Network Extension not starting on AltStore / SideStore sideloads. VpnManager was hard-coded to `providerBundleIdentifier = io.github.madeye.meow.PacketTunnel`, but re-signers rewrite the extension's bundle id (team-prefix or outright swap) — iOS then had no matching appex to launch and `startVPNTunnel()` silently snapped back to .disconnected. The app now discovers the real PacketTunnel bundle id at runtime by scanning `PlugIns/*.appex` for the one whose `NSExtensionPointIdentifier` is `com.apple.networkextension.packet-tunnel`.
- Previous 1.1.2 change: app-group identifier resolution (Latin-1 decode of the embedded provisioning profile).
- Previous 1.1.0 changes: Jetsam / memory-growth fix in PacketTunnel (Rust→ObjC rewrite, single tokio worker); on-demand VPN enabled with disconnectOnSleep=false.

versions.localizedDescription:
- Fix Network Extension not starting on AltStore / SideStore sideloads. VpnManager was hard-coded to `providerBundleIdentifier = io.github.madeye.meow.PacketTunnel`, but re-signers rewrite the extension's bundle id (team-prefix or outright swap) — iOS then had no matching appex to launch and `startVPNTunnel()` silently snapped back to .disconnected. The app now discovers the real PacketTunnel bundle id at runtime by scanning `PlugIns/*.appex` for the one whose `NSExtensionPointIdentifier` is `com.apple.networkextension.packet-tunnel`.
- Previous 1.1.2 change: app-group identifier resolution (Latin-1 decode of the embedded provisioning profile).
- Previous 1.1.0 changes: Jetsam / memory-growth fix in PacketTunnel (Rust→ObjC rewrite, single tokio worker); on-demand VPN enabled with disconnectOnSleep=false.

- Fix app-group identifier resolution for AltStore / SideStore sideloads (Latin-1 decode of the embedded provisioning profile). The NE bundle-id lookup was still hard-coded in this build, so startVPNTunnel() did not actually start the tunnel — install 1.1.3 or later.

- Attempted to fix the AltStore / SideStore sideload crash by resolving the app-group identifier from the embedded provisioning profile, but the ASCII decoder choked on CMS/PKCS7 bytes and the fix was a no-op in practice. Install 1.1.2 or later.

- Jetsam / memory-growth fix in PacketTunnel (Rust→ObjC rewrite, single tokio worker)
- On-demand VPN enabled, disconnectOnSleep=false
- Build tooling & logging improvements

Note: this build has a hard-coded app-group identifier and crashes on launch when sideloaded via AltStore / SideStore. Install 1.1.1 or later.

privacy.name: NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Used by the VPN packet tunnel to forward traffic.
